title: Tetris
description: Stack falling blocks to clear lines. Classic puzzle action!

instructions.desktop: Arrow keys to move/rotate • Space to drop • P to pause
instructions.mobile: Swipe to move • Tap to rotate • Hold for hard drop

how_to_play.title: How to Play
items: Use arrow keys to move pieces left/right
Up arrow or X to rotate clockwise
Down arrow to soft drop (faster fall)
Clear lines by filling every cell in a row

tips.title: Pro Tips
items: Build a flat foundation - gaps are hard to fill
Keep your options open - don't lock in early
Watch the next piece to plan ahead
